name: DoIP_InitAsTester
title: DoIP_InitAsTester
description: Per default the DoIP.DLL will operate as ECU simulation. In order to use this DLL as tester, e.g. in a test module, the operation mode has to be changed by calling this function in on preStart. It is NOT necessary to call this function when the built-in diagnostics channel is used, i.e. if the DoIP.DLL is not configured in the tester.
